penalties.description: This is an instructional video showing demonstration techniques, not a scored performance attempt of the ligating loop task.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an instructional video containing demonstration clips for FLS tasks 4 and 5, not a scoreable attempt at task 3 (ligating loop). GPT-4o incorrectly scored what appears to be demonstration content as a performance attempt.

claude_value.description: This is an instructional video showing demonstration techniques, not a scored performance attempt of the ligating loop task.

gpt_value.description: The loop was slightly distal to the target mark upon final inspection.

disagreements.rationale: Claude's identification of instructional content rather than performance attempt is more consistent with the video containing demonstration clips for tasks 4 and 5, not task 3.
No actual task 3 performance occurred to time, only instructional demonstration content.
No ligating loop task phases were performed since this was instructional content, not a performance attempt.
